label: Transparent holly leaves motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Holly transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only holly leaves with red berries for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete botanical subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A compact winter hedgerow sprig of glossy deep green holly leaves, sharp scalloped edges, waxy highlights, a few curled leaves showing darker undersides, clusters of vivid red holly berries, tiny snow-white frost crystals and a few clean snow flecks resting on the leaves and berries. The identity must read as holly leaves, not ivy, laurel, mistletoe, or generic evergreen.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the full sprig, leaves, stems, berries, and frost without cropping. Clean studio lighting that preserves glossy leaf detail and berry shine. No cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no wreath, no ribbon, no pine branch, no candles, no ornaments, no wrapped gifts, no hand, no vase, no garden scene, no props, no text, no watermark.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Holly light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Holly", derived from the visible holly leaves motif: glossy deep green spiked leaves, vivid red berries, snow-white frost, and winter hedgerow neutrals. This board is a source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible festive commerce UI theme.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 composition, high-resolution 4K-class source board, target 3840 x 2160. Clean professional product design-system presentation, not a landing page.
Required visible sections: Morphous Holly, Holly Leaves, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard / Data, Forms, Table, Command / Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from glossy holly leaf greens, near-black winter leaf undersides, waxy highlights, red berry clusters, snow-white frost, pale stem edges, cool hedgerow bark neutrals, and crisp serrated leaf geometry. The board must read as festive commerce system, not generic Christmas decoration.
Typography: English commerce UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 価格. Keep text short, large, and legible.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, product cards, cart summary, promo strip, table rows, order list view, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, revenue chart, inventory chart, empty/loading/error states, progress, spacing scale, radius samples, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium festive commerce system, 8px radius, snow-white and cool pearl surfaces, glossy holly green primary actions, berry red cart and promotion accents, frosted neutral panels, fine spiked-leaf divider rhythm, tiny berry-dot status markers, waxy leaf highlight texture, dense but organized merchant dashboard.
Color palette: use only motif-derived glossy holly green, dark leaf shadow, red berry, snow white, pale frost, twig brown, winter hedgerow grey, and subdued festive commerce accents derived from those colors.
Constraints: no wreath, no ribbon, no ornaments, no candles, no wrapped gifts, no generic holiday illustration, no unrelated bright colors, no purple/blue gradients, no beige/brown dominance, no stock UI kit look, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Holly", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Holly dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Holly" / "Holly Leaves". Translate the visible light design-system language into dark mode; do not invent a new unrelated theme.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 composition, high-resolution 4K-class source board, target 3840 x 2160. Clean professional shadcn/tweakcn design-system presentation, festive commerce system mood.
Required visible sections: Morphous Holly, Holly Leaves, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard / Data, Forms, Table, Command / Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve glossy holly green primary actions, vivid red berry cart and promotion accents, snow-white frost highlights, cool hedgerow grey neutrals, bark-brown support neutrals, thin spiked-leaf dividers, berry-dot status markers, merchant dashboard structure, product cards, cart summary, and 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid.
Typography: English commerce UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 価格. Keep text short, large, and legible.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/tertiary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, checkbox, radio, switch, input, select, textarea, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, product cards, cart summary, merchant metric cards, revenue line chart, inventory bar chart, donut chart, table rows, sidebar navigation, command search palette, empty/loading/error states, progress, stepper, texture samples, radius samples, spacing scale, shadow samples, token code snippets.
Visual details: deep winter leaf backgrounds, near-black green panels, pale snow foreground, frosted glass surfaces, glossy green active states, berry red destructive and sale states, muted hedgerow borders, subtle waxy leaf texture overlays, restrained festive glow, crisp cards and controls.
Color palette: use only motif-derived glossy holly greens, deepest leaf shadow, berry reds, snow white, pale frost, twig brown, winter hedgerow grey. Avoid unrelated saturated colors.
Constraints: no wreath, no ribbon, no ornaments, no candles, no wrapped gifts, no generic holiday illustration, no neon green, no generic red/black gaming UI, no pure-black flat background, no unrelated purple/blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Holly", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
